EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The service {object.name} is stopped on host {event_src.host}
The service {object.name} is started on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} stopped the service {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
New services {object.name} are installed on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} resumed the service {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} created the service {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} removed the service {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} suspended the service {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} started the service {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
